---
permalink: /llms.txt
---
# Glaucoma Data Archive

Plain-text archive of public glaucoma treatment source records. The canonical pages are HTML generated by Jekyll from local JSON/YAML manifests and markdown placeholders.

## Core entry points

- Home: {{ '/' | absolute_url }}
- Documents: {{ '/documents/' | absolute_url }}
- Companies: {{ '/companies/' | absolute_url }}
- Programs: {{ '/programs/' | absolute_url }}
- ClinicalTrials.gov updates: {{ '/clinical-trials/' | absolute_url }}
- News: {{ '/press-releases/' | absolute_url }}
- Indications: {{ '/indications/' | absolute_url }}

## Representative companies

{% assign companies = site.data.company_profiles | sort: "name" %}
{% for company in companies %}
- {{ company.name }}: {{ company.page_url | absolute_url }}
{% endfor %}

## Use notes

- Every document record links to the original public source when available.
- Company colors and logo paths are stored in `_data/company_profiles.json`.
- Clinical trial rows are refreshed by `scripts/generate_glaucoma_seed_data.py` through the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API.
